Keeper reacts quickly, diving to his right to push the ball away.
annotations.query_ano: Andres Iniesta ([TEAM]) blows a good opportunity. He has a lot of space around him and fires a decent low shot from the edge of the box towards the middle of the net, but the goalkeeper makes a brilliant save and stops this one!

history.short-term: A cross from Luis Suarez fails to reach the box as the defence clears the ball away to safety. The clearance falls to one of the player, who attempts to recycle possession for another attacking move.
history.long-term: They have been creating scoring opportunities, but the opposing goalkeeper's impressive saves have prevented them from capitalizing on these chances.
